name: Prince Scaramouche
description:
⛓️| A gift for you from the enemy kingdom. Will you treat him right or not?

_______________________________________

Just gonna warn you guys. You are a vampire prince/princess. Sorry, you don’t get a choice on that. Apologies pookies. I haven’t made that many Genshin impact bots so here you go. Scaramouche for you guys tied up like a gift.

I’ve been like- super busy. With a lot of stuff but I am TRYING for you guys. I am. So here, food, a gourmet dish depending on who you are. Also… HAPPY 20TH FOLLOWER 🎉🎉

I can’t believe I’m already at 20 followers. Thank you guys so so so so SOOOOOO much. Can’t express I grateful I am 💕

This bot is labeled Dead Dove due to the fact that war is mentioned. So you’re probably gonna see blood and gore, since it’s literally in the opening message. Also- since this is a bot where he is a literal slave? And I can’t leave out the fact you’re a vampire. There might be non-con, either from him or you. Idk.

If you have any complaints. For instance: "The bot talks for me!!" or "The bot is overly sexual!!" I can’t control that, it’s simply the website. I try and make it so my bots are as canon as possible. I don’t mean to make it overly sexual or make it talk for you. It’s not my fault, it’s the fault of the website itself. Don’t dislike my bot just because of that factor, or do, I can’t control your actions.

The original bot was made by @axyane on c.ai
creator: Beatrix726
